projects.title: BrainWave
projects.description: AI-powered tutoring platform for elementary students with real-time chat, progress tracking, and COPPA compliance.
projects.longDescription: BrainWave is a COPPA-compliant AI tutoring platform designed for elementary school students (grades 4-6). It features real-time conversational tutoring via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, practice tests with progress tracking, parent monitoring dashboards, and comprehensive data privacy controls.
features: Real-time AI tutoring with age-appropriate language
Progress tracking across subjects
Parent dashboard with student linking
COPPA/FERPA compliant data handling
Practice tests with categorized questions

projects.title: Spec2CAD2
projects.description: AI-driven CAD automation system that converts JSON specifications into FreeCAD 3D models with vision capabilities.
projects.longDescription: Spec2CAD2 is a hybrid AI-deterministic system that transforms JSON specifications and technical drawings into fully realized FreeCAD 3D models. It employs semantic validation, face-aware coordinate systems, and supports features like holes, pockets, slots, chamfers, and fillets.
features: JSON-to-CAD model generation
Technical drawing processing with AI vision
Deterministic + AI-driven hybrid pipeline
Face-local coordinate system for precision
Export to FCStd, STEP, STL formats

projects.title: Otto_2
projects.description: Autonomous Shopify site builder that transforms business data into fully functional, AI-tested storefronts.
projects.longDescription: Otto_2 is a single-operator autonomous system that converts customer business data into complete Shopify storefronts. It uses Claude for code generation, Gemini for UX evaluation, and features self-healing test loops with automated fixes until quality thresholds are met.
features: Fully autonomous theme generation
AI-powered UX evaluation with Gemini
Self-healing test loops with Claude fixes
Docker-isolated testing environment
Discord notifications for review

projects.title: Phantom
projects.description: Privacy-first voice assistant with speaker verification, Canvas LMS integration, intelligent scheduling, and a gamified productivity system.
projects.longDescription: Phantom is a fully local voice assistant running on consumer hardware (8GB VRAM). It combines wake word detection, speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN embeddings, Whisper STT, and Piper TTS—all processing audio locally with zero cloud AI dependency. Beyond calendar management, Phantom integrates with Canvas LMS for academic tracking, features an intelligent task scheduler with duration estimation, and includes a gamified token system that lets you earn screen time by completing tasks.
features: Speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN embeddings and passcode fallback
Phonetic correction for misheard voice commands
Canvas LMS integration: announcements, assignments, grades, exam reminders
Intelligent task scheduling with duration estimation and 'plan my day'
Gamified token system: earn tokens for tasks, spend on screen time
Browser/Steam blocker with URL detection and overlay enforcement
AI-powered task categorization with user-correction learning
Twilio phone reminders with pre-generated Piper TTS audio
Google Calendar CRUD with natural language date/time parsing
Security alerts via phone call/SMS for unauthorized access attempts
